mainEntity.name: Can I do AEO best practices without rebuilding my whole website?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can start with existing pages instead of rebuilding your whole site. Rewrite the top of the page so it answers the question immediately, add supporting details below, and use schema only where it matches the visible content.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Many AEO gains come from improving existing pages with clearer answers, better structure, and appropriate schema. You do not need a full site rebuild to get started.
